notes: The game works native on Linux. Tried to run it on Proton, but nothing happens, I can see only that the hl2.exe process is running.
title: Team Fortress 2

notes: It was impossible to play, the game launched to the main menu but 3/4ths of the screen were completely black and unusable. Maybe there is a workaround but I preferred sticking to the native version.
title: Team Fortress 2

notes: The game by default boots to a black screen, however using d9vk, the performance appears to be better than the native linux port(strange but i suspect that the old dx9 to ogl layer valve used to port the game is slower than d9vk), the biggest issue however, is that for some reason the game boots in insecure mode, which basically prevents you from joining vac secured servers.
title: Team Fortress 2

notes: Impossible to play with Proton. I get a blackcreen and just hear the menu game sounds. Stick with Native, it's better.
title: Team Fortress 2
